title: Caramelized British Pork Stir-Fry
description: A fresh and chewy post-workout dish featuring caramelized pork with cherry tomatoes, perfect for a paleo-friendly meal.
instructions: Prepare the pork by slicing it into thin strips.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced garlic and ginger; sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add chicken to the pan, season with salt and pepper, and cook until golden brown on all sides. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add tomato paste followed by sugar. Stir continuously until a thick caramel sauce forms.
Return the chicken to the pan, allowing it to soak in the caramel sauce for about 2 minutes.
Add cherry tomatoes to the pan and cook for another minute or two, ensuring they are slightly softened but not mushy.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
